reason: All four Round-1 gaps are fully resolved and no new HIGH or MEDIUM issues were introduced. GAP 1 (HIGH): §3.9 now enumerates the L3 steps in the correct order — check_input → retrieve source_texts → sandwich prompt → LLM call → GroundingChecker on generated output → fallthrough L4 if ungrounded — and adds an explicit SAD Conformance Constraint forbidding reversal of steps 4/5. §4.1 sequence diagram is fully consistent with §3.9. GAP 2 (MEDIUM): EmotionClassifier sub-module is now specified in §3.7 with source path `src/omnibot/emotion/classifier.py`, `classify(text)->EmotionScore` API, a three-option strategy table (A/B/C), a clear rationale for selecting Option A (rule-based keyword lexicon, ~0ms, zero external deps, within NFR-08 1.5s budget), and an ADR-pending marker. EmotionClassifier appears correctly in §2.2 layer table row 8, SAB §6 `emotion` modules, and §7 FR-17 mapping row. GAP 3 (LOW): §3.8 now explicitly specifies the `DialogueStateTracker` orchestrator class (distinct from `DialogueState` data class) with `__init__(db, intent_classifier)`, `get_state()`, `process_message()`, and `_apply_transition_rules()` methods, plus a naming note cross-referencing §2.2, §6, and §7. GAP 4 (LOW): §3.11 adds an explicit **Architectural Decision (ADR-pending)** block tracing the priority→reason assignment (emotion_trigger=2/urgent, low_confidence=1/high, out_of_scope=0/normal) to user-impact severity rationale rather than leaving it untraceable to FR-20. Two pre-existing LOW-severity inconsistencies remain but were not introduced by Round-2 edits: (a) §7 FR-18 source path cites only `dst/__init__.py` but §3.8 defines DialogueStateTracker in `dst/tracker.py`; (b) §4.1 L4 creates EscalationRequest with reason="out_of_scope" while §4.2 Trigger B groups the same L4 fallthrough under reason="low_confidence" priority=1 — the two sections do not fully agree on the L4 escalation reason code. Neither gap is blocking at this phase.
citations: SAD.md §3.9 — L3 LLM steps 1–7 + SAD Conformance Constraint
SAD.md §4.1 — L3 branch in happy-path sequence diagram
SAD.md §3.7 — EmotionClassifier sub-module + Option A strategy table
SAD.md §2.2 — layer table row 8 (emotion: EmotionClassifier listed)
SAD.md §6 SAB — emotion layer modules include EmotionClassifier
SAD.md §3.8 — DialogueStateTracker class spec + naming note

gaps.description: §7 FR-18 source path column lists only `src/omnibot/dst/__init__.py`; DialogueStateTracker orchestrator is defined in `src/omnibot/dst/tracker.py` per §3.8. The mapping table is incomplete for this FR.

§4.1 L4 creates EscalationRequest with reason="out_of_scope" (priority=0, 30 min SLA) while §4.2 Trigger B groups the identical L4 fallthrough under reason="low_confidence" (priority=1, 15 min SLA). The two sections disagree on which reason code and priority L4 fallthrough produces; pre-existing inconsistency not introduced by Round-2 edits.
